---
name: IFx Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: feature request
assignees: MelodicCougar7

---

**IFx only supports 1.20.1! You *may* report bugs with older or newer versions for some future maintainer to peruse, but they will not make it into IFx for the foreseeable future.**

**Forge Version**
Just to ensure IE is at fault, and not Forge itself

**Full mod list**
Just to ensure IE is at fault, and not one of your mods


**Logs**
Provide a crash log if you have it. If not, provide your latest log. You can skip this step, but I may intentionally delay patching your issue until you provide a log (I will contact you if this is the case, but there will be still be a delay).

**Description**
Please concisely describe the bug and its impact on the game.

**Steps to reproduce**
Spend the most time on this. Issues that cannot be reliably be reproduced will not be patched!

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about this here.
